description: Create a time-limited viewing grant for a private attestation. Only the attestation subject can create grants.

main.description: Grant a third party time-limited access to view a private attestation. The caller must be the attestation subject.

errors.name: Forbidden
errors.description: Only the attestation subject can create viewing grants.

communityDid.description: The community DID that issued the attestation.

grantedToDid.description: The DID of the party being granted access.

grantedFields.description: Optional list of specific fields to grant access to.

grantId.description: Unique identifier for the viewing grant.

expiresAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the grant expires.
